## Summary
Describe the changes and the technical rationale behind them.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug Fix
- [ ] New Feature
- [ ] Performance Optimization
- [ ] Documentation / Refactoring
- [ ] Other: __________

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project standards (`make audit`).
- [ ] Unit tests added or updated.
- [ ] Documentation updated.
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`make fulltest`).

## Benchmark Results
Since this is a compression tool, please provide performance delta if applicable:
- **Benchmarks** (use `./scripts/run_bench.sh` or `./scripts/compare_on_repo.sh`))
- **Memory Usage:** (Any significant impact on RAM?)

---

> [!NOTE]
> If you are using a trunk-based or rev-based workflow (like Jujutsu/jj), please ensure the commit history is clean before submission.*
